HeroSubline: From idea to finished masterpiece. We sew curtains, bedding, and home textiles to your measurements
HeroSubline2: Tablecloths, runners, napkins and terrace cushions — designed with attention to detail
ConsultationSuccess: Thank you! We'll call you back soon.
ConsultationError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Benefit1Sub: Textiles that adapt to your home
Benefit1Detail:
We believe: textiles should adapt to your home, not the other way around. Every table, every window, and every terrace has its own characteristics. That's why we've moved away from mass standards in favor of personalization.

Custom-made products: From small napkins to luxurious tablecloths for non-standard tables.

Attention to detail: We help you select the shape, color, and finish (for example, delicate ruffles or lace) that will perfectly complement your specific interior.
Benefit2Sub: Aesthetics That Aren't Afraid of Life
Benefit2Detail:
Your textiles should stay flawless not only on holidays but also during daily family breakfasts. We choose fabrics that combine classic beauty with modern technology.

Water-repellent properties: A special impregnation allows you to simply wipe away spilled liquid with a napkin, keeping the fabric clean.

Durability: Our materials are wear-resistant, pleasant to the touch, and maintain color richness even after many care cycles.
Benefit3Sub: Quality control at every stage of sewing
Benefit3Detail: Our own workshop allows us to control the quality of every stitch and guarantee the exact deadlines for your order.
FooterAbout: Casanel custom sewing workshop. We create coziness and comfort in your home.
About_Title: Textile Art with Soul and 15 Years of Experience
About_Intro: The story of the Casanel brand is a journey from the idea of a cozy home to professional textile production, where every product has its own character
About_Roots_1: The brand was founded in 2021, but a new stage of its life began in 2023, when Casanel passed into the hands of a person for whom sewing is a calling.
About_Roots_2: I am Oksana, the current owner of the brand, and my journey in the world of professional sewing began back in 2011. For over 10 years, I created complex individual orders, studying the intricacies of working with various fabrics and shapes.
About_Craft_1: Today, Casanel is a combination of years of experience and a modern take on home comfort. When I took over the brand, my main goal was to preserve the traditions of quality and introduce a professional approach to every detail.
Personal Control: I personally control every stage of creating your orders:
Fabric_Desc: we choose only those materials that last for years (in particular, our famous water-repellent canvases).
Cut_Desc: thanks to experience in individual sewing, we create products that fit perfectly on your furniture.
Detail_Desc: every stitch is the result of craftsmanship honed over the years.
Mission_Text_New: We don’t just sew tablecloths or pillows. We create an atmosphere you want to return to. Today, Casanel is a small but ambitious Ukrainian production. Each of your orders helps us develop and bring our dream closer: to make Ukrainian textiles recognizable and loved in every home.
About_Closing: By choosing Casanel, you choose experience tested by time and quality created with love
Horeca_Subtitle: Professional Textile for Restaurants, Hotels, and Brands
Horeca_Intro_1: In the HoReCa sphere, textile is not decor, but a part of the service. How a table, napkin, or packaging looks forms the first impression and directly affects the perception of your brand.
Horeca_Intro_2: Casanel is engaged in custom textile sewing for the HoReCa and B2B segments. We create products that not only look aesthetic but also withstand daily intensive use.
Horeca_Production_Desc: We offer textile sewing for restaurants, cafes, hotels, and country complexes:
Terrace Textile: textile for the hall and summer terraces
Horeca_Production_Footer: Each product is adapted to the format of the establishment, interior style, and load level.
Textile for Brands: Textile for Brands and B2B Clients
B2B_Desc: We work with brands and online stores that need high-quality textiles for sale or packaging:
Clothing Packaging: packaging for clothes, linen, and accessories
B2B_Footer: Such textiles strengthen the product and add value without cheapening the look.
Corporate_Desc: Solutions for companies working with customer experience and brand:
Projects_Desc: We cooperate with design studios and event agencies:
Wear_Desc: Fabrics withstand frequent washing, maintain shape and appearance even under high load.
Savings_Desc: Water-repellent fabrics absorb less dirt, require less frequent washing, and last longer.
Branding_Desc: We apply the logo with machine embroidery: does not wear off, looks professional, and strengthens brand identity.
Quality_Desc: Every order is controlled: exact sizes, correct geometry, and strong seams.
Horeca_Experience_Text: 15+ years of individual sewing allow us to implement complex projects, work with different types of fabrics, and achieve stable quality in every product.
Step_1: You describe the need or project
Step_2: We select materials and product format
Horeca_Contact_Intro: To order textile for HoReCa or B2B, write to us or call:
Horeca_Final_CTA: Describe the task, volumes, and usage format — we'll offer a solution that's beneficial in work, not just in appearance.
